race.comment: RIVA AQUARAMA (11) missed by 0.9L when first-up in a stronger race, finishing off strongly from the back of the pack. Pike remains in the saddle and drawing away from the inside is a big tick for her. Can build into the race around the turn and get the job done. JUST FAMOUS (3) won three in-a-row before a 0.2L defeat most recently as a $1.30 favourite at Kalgoorlie. He does tend to dip second-up but bounced back third-up. Fiore rides, he should get every chance and he rates highly on his recent form. LANFRANCO (4) got back to winning ways in an Open 3YO race before the spell. He's trialled nicely since and we'll get a nice guide on that trial form in race three. Can pick up from where he left off. STORM AWAY (6) is third-up now and should be better suited out to 1200m today. Can be in the finish again. HEDAWOOD (8) just missed in a photo last time out and is not to be discounted.
